reviews.comment:
Una Estacion de servicio bastante completa, tiene locales de venta de artesanias etc. Un rrstaurante bastante comoleto para almorzar y cenar comidas al plato o sandwich. .

(Translated by Google)
A fairly complete service station, with shops selling handicrafts, etc. A fairly complete restaurant for lunch and dinner, serving meals or sandwiches.
